name: From Outcomes to Actions: Leveraging Hindsight for Long-Horizon Language Agent Training
summary: arXiv:2607.16257v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a widely adopted technique for improving large language models (LLMs) on complex tasks. Despite this progres...
description: arXiv:2607.16257v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) has become a widely adopted technique for improving large language models (LLMs) on complex tasks. Despite this progress, existing RL methods still face challenges in training agents with longer-horizon interactions. One major bottleneck is distinguishing the contribution of different actions in long-horizon interacti...
author: Zishang Jiang, Tingyun Li, Jinyi Han, Xinyi Wang, Sihang Jiang, Yizhou Ying, Xiaojun Meng, Jiansheng Wei, Jiaqing Liang, Yanghua Xiao
